name: Reflex Cat Treats - 100% Natural Tuna Fillet 50g
description: Reflex Cat Treats - 100% NaturalTuna Fillet are super-premium cat treats that are easily digested due to its high meat content. Includes fatty acids that support healthy skin and coat health. INGREDIENTS: tuna (85%), potato starch, sorbitol, glycerin, plant protein, animal protein, salt. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 35 Crude Fat (%) - 3.5 Crude Ash (%) - 4 Crude Fiber (%) - 0.5 Moisture (%) - 26 FEEDING RECOMMENDATIONS:? Recommended for all adult cats as a snack in addition to meals. This product does not replace your cat's daily food requirement. Store in a cool, dry place.
